'''ât-y-s-th''' ('''kataysethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anticipate|anticipate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anticipate|anticipate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-y-s-th
|-
! Lemma
| kataysethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitaysethoko|thitaysethoko]] || [[word:jitaysethoko|jitaysethoko]] || [[word:shitaysethoko|shitaysethoko]] || [[word:kitaysethoko|kitaysethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutaysethoko|thuthutaysethoko]] || [[word:jujutaysethoko|jujutaysethoko]] || [[word:shushutaysethoko|shushutaysethoko]] || [[word:kukutaysethoko|kukutaysethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotaysethoko|thotaysethoko]] || [[word:jotaysethoko|jotaysethoko]] || [[word:shotaysethoko|shotaysethoko]] || [[word:kotaysethoko|kotaysethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtaysethoko|thĂŠtaysethoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtaysethoko|jĂŠtaysethoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtaysethoko|shĂŠtaysethoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtaysethoko|kĂŠtaysethoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thataysethoko|thataysethoko]] || [[word:jataysethoko|jataysethoko]] || [[word:shataysethoko|shataysethoko]] || [[word:kataysethoko|kataysethoko]]
|}
